title: epipactis leptochila subsp. futakii
intro: Epipactis leptochila subsp. futakii, also known as the Epipactis leptochila futakii, is a subspecies of orchid plant. It is primarily used in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Epipactis leptochila subsp. futakii include teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
